description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The front facade features large, grid-patterned windows that span both floors, allowing for ample natural light. A covered porch with outdoor seating is present on the lower level, while an open balcony with a table and chairs is situated above. The exterior is clad in horizontal white siding, and a set of stairs leads from the ground to the upper balcony. There is a small utility area with what appear to be laundry machines adjacent to the stairs. The house is surrounded by a metal railing, suggesting a private outdoor space or terrace.
description: A modern two-story house with large grid windows, a flat roof, and both covered and open outdoor living spaces. The exterior is white with horizontal siding and metal railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing large grid windows, covered porch with seating, stairs to the upper balcony, and a utility area with laundry machines.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the open upper balcony, and the continuation of the metal railing.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings, showing the plain horizontal siding and the open upper balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the large grid windows and the covered porch area, with the metal railing visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: large grid-patterned windows in symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass double door beneath a covered porch with steps, supported by simple columns and adjacent to outdoor seating.
